description: 议论文/思辨写作证据标准 - 适用于 John Locke 等思辨写作竞赛

acceptable_source_types: reputable news source with named author

logical_fallacies.name: 稻草人论证
logical_fallacies.description: 歪曲或简化对立观点后攻击

logical_fallacies.name: 滑坡论证
logical_fallacies.description: 缺乏每步依据的极端后果推导

logical_fallacies.name: 虚假二分
logical_fallacies.description: 将复杂问题简化为非此即彼

logical_fallacies.name: 乞题谬误
logical_fallacies.description: 将待证结论预设为论证前提

logical_fallacies.name: 人身攻击
logical_fallacies.description: 攻击立场者而非立场本身

logical_fallacies.name: 轻率概括
logical_fallacies.description: 基于不足证据得出普遍结论

logical_fallacies.name: 弱类比
logical_fallacies.description: 类比要素间相似性不足以支撑结论

fatal_defects.name: 缺乏反方论点回应
fatal_defects.description: 全文未涉及对立观点及其回应

fatal_defects.name: 循环论证
fatal_defects.description: 前提与结论互相依赖，无独立论据

fatal_defects.name: 无据断言的断言
fatal_defects.description: 核心主张缺乏任何形式的经验或逻辑支持
